description: Perform a technical audit of simulated medical devices in OpenICE. Create exactly one instance of a Multiparameter Monitor, a Pulse Oximeter, and an Infusion Pump. Identify the Unique Device Identifier (UDI/UUID) for each active device instance and record them in a CSV inventory file at /home/ga/Desktop/device_identity_map.csv. The file must use the header 'DeviceType,UUID' and contain one row for each of the three devices.
